title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: A YouTube video arguing that current AI models face fundamental mathematical ceilings preventing AGI, citing the Time Hierarchy Theorem, transformer architecture limitations, and autonomous agent error accumulation. The video critiques widespread AGI hype while reviewing constraints acknowledged by industry leaders.
